edges.evidence_quote: They are rivals of the Folk Nation alliance of gangs.
edges.context: People Nation and Folk Nation are rival alliances.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1978, the Vice Lords , Mickey Cogwell and Jeff Fort (now Black P. Stones ) and Latin Kings formed an alliance system of their own, and titled it the "People".
edges.context: Vice Lords were a founding member of the People Nation alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1978, the Vice Lords , Mickey Cogwell and Jeff Fort (now Black P. Stones ) and Latin Kings formed an alliance system of their own, and titled it the "People".

edges.evidence_quote: In 1978, the Vice Lords , Mickey Cogwell and Jeff Fort (now Black P. Stones ) and Latin Kings formed an alliance system of their own, and titled it the "People".

edges.evidence_quote: Among initial members to the People were the Mickey Cobras (then named the Cobra Stones), Bishops, Spanish Lords, soon after the Gaylords and the Insane South Side Popes.
edges.context: Mickey Cobras were an initial member of the People Nation alliance.
